title: MVSD-436 My Girlfriend Moved From The Country To Tokyo To Pursue Her Dreams, But Before She Knew It, She Had Become The Victim Of The Handsome Young Pieces-Of-Shit Cocks At Her Office A Long-Distance NTR Tale Rika Tsubaki - Tsubaki Rika
description: I have been dating for 5 years. I met him in the same lecture at Tohoku Agricultural University. He confessed and dating because he was attracted to Rika's personality, which was serious but kind and considerate. After graduating, I, who is the tracer of my parents' house, stayed in the country and moved to Tokyo in pursuit of my old dream. We promised to call each other every day so that we wouldn't be separated from each other, and started a long-distance relationship. I'm worried that I won't be fooled by a bad guy or I'll have a hard time. Let's go to Tokyo secretly next month! You will be surprised!
maker: エムズビデオグループ
